entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop being evaluated for disease resistance.

entities.name: COLLAR ROT
entities.description: A disease affecting groundnut caused by Aspergillus niger.

entities.name: STEM ROT
entities.description: A disease affecting groundnut caused by Sclerotium rolfsii.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS NIGER
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes collar rot in groundnut.

entities.name: SCLEROTIUM ROLFSII
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes stem rot in groundnut.

entities.name: RESISTANCE SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating breeding lines for their ability to resist specific pathogens.

entities.name: ADVANCED BREEDING LINES
entities.description: Genetic lines of groundnut being screened for disease resistance.

entities.name: JL-24
entities.description: A susceptible check line used in the screening process.

entities.name: J-11
entities.description: A susceptible check line used in the screening process.

entities.name: TMV-2
entities.description: A susceptible check line used in the screening process.

entities.name: ICGV86699
entities.description: A groundnut breeding line showing moderate resistance to stem rot.

entities.name: ICGV91114
entities.description: A groundnut breeding line showing moderate resistance to stem rot.

entities.name: ICGV89280
entities.description: A groundnut breeding line showing moderate resistance to stem rot.

entities.name: ICGV99058
entities.description: A groundnut breeding line showing high susceptibility to stem rot.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The capacity of the plant to withstand or recover from disease infection.
